_meta.description: Range resolution rules for header detection, table boundary inference, temporal row selection, named range expansion, and safety constraints in spreadsheet calculation agents.

description.en: Aggregate within groups defined by a grouping column (e.g., total per department)
description.pt: Agregar dentro de grupos definidos por uma coluna de agrupamento (ex.: total por departamento)

rules.safetyNotes: Groups with a single row yield trivial aggregation. Verify the grouping column is categorical, not continuous.

description.en: Aggregate an entire column of data, excluding header and footer rows
description.pt: Agregar uma coluna inteira de dados, excluindo linhas de cabeçalho e rodapé

rules.safetyNotes: Ensure total/subtotal rows are excluded to avoid double-counting. Check column type before numeric aggregation.

en: average of all values in Revenue
pt: média de todos os valores em Receita

description.en: Aggregate the same column across multiple sheets with matching structure
description.pt: Agregar a mesma coluna em várias planilhas com estrutura correspondente

rules.safetyNotes: Column position may differ across sheets even if header matches. Always match by header text, not column index.

en: total sales from every month tab
pt: soma de Receita em todas as planilhas
total de vendas de cada aba mensal

description.en: Compute running or cumulative aggregation over ordered rows
description.pt: Calcular agregação acumulada ou corrida sobre linhas ordenadas

rules.safetyNotes: Cumulative calculations require a well-defined row order. If rows are unordered, results may be meaningless.

description.en: Exclude statistical outliers from aggregation using IQR or z-score method
description.pt: Excluir outliers estatísticos da agregação usando método IQR ou z-score

rules.safetyNotes: Outlier exclusion can silently remove valid extreme values. Always report how many rows were excluded.

description.en: Aggregate only visible or filtered rows, respecting active filters
description.pt: Agregar somente linhas visíveis ou filtradas, respeitando filtros ativos

rules.safetyNotes: Hidden rows from manual hide (not autofilter) may be unintentionally excluded. Clarify filter source.

description.en: Compute moving average over a rolling window of N periods
description.pt: Calcular média móvel sobre uma janela rolante de N períodos

rules.safetyNotes: First N-1 rows will have partial windows. Decide whether to show partial results or null for incomplete windows.

description.en: Select rows within a percentile-based scope such as top 10% or bottom quartile
description.pt: Selecionar linhas dentro de um escopo baseado em percentil como top 10% ou quartil inferior

rules.safetyNotes: Percentile boundaries may split tied values. Decide on inclusive vs exclusive boundary treatment.

description.en: Aggregate only the user-specified cell range, ignoring broader table context
description.pt: Agregar somente o intervalo de células especificado pelo usuário, ignorando contexto mais amplo da tabela

rules.safetyNotes: User-specified ranges may accidentally include header or total rows. Warn if first or last row looks non-data.

description.en: Perform weighted aggregation using a specified weight column
description.pt: Realizar agregação ponderada usando uma coluna de peso especificada

rules.safetyNotes: Zero or negative weights may distort results. Validate weight column contains only positive numbers.

pt: nota ponderada por horas de crédito

description.en: Select a column by matching its header text, with fuzzy matching support
description.pt: Selecionar uma coluna correspondendo o texto do cabeçalho, com suporte a correspondência aproximada

rules.safetyNotes: Fuzzy matching may select wrong column if multiple headers are similar. Prefer exact match when possible.

description.en: Select a column by its letter (A, B, C) or numeric index (1, 2, 3)
description.pt: Selecionar uma coluna pela letra (A, B, C) ou índice numérico (1, 2, 3)

rules.safetyNotes: Column index may be off-by-one if user counts from 1 vs 0. Always confirm which convention is intended.

description.en: Select a column by semantic field id matching (e.g., recognizing 'revenue' maps to a specific column)
description.pt: Selecionar uma coluna por correspondência de campo semântico (ex.: reconhecer que 'receita' mapeia para uma coluna específica)

rules.safetyNotes: Semantic matching relies on inferred field types. Low-confidence matches should prompt user confirmation.

description.en: Select all columns of a given data type (numeric, text, date, boolean)
description.pt: Selecionar todas as colunas de um tipo de dado específico (numérico, texto, data, booleano)

rules.safetyNotes: Mixed-type columns may be excluded if dominance threshold is strict. Lower threshold for messy data.

description.en: Exclude specific columns from the current selection
description.pt: Excluir colunas específicas da seleção atual

rules.safetyNotes: Excluding all columns is an error. Validate at least one column remains after exclusion.

description.en: Select the first column containing numeric data
description.pt: Selecionar a primeira coluna contendo dados numéricos

rules.safetyNotes: ID columns are often numeric but not intended for aggregation. Consider skipping first numeric column if it looks like an identifier.

description.en: Select multiple columns by a list of header names
description.pt: Selecionar múltiplas colunas por uma lista de nomes de cabeçalho

rules.safetyNotes: If some headers are not found, warn but proceed with found columns. User may have misspelled a column name.

description.en: Select a contiguous range of columns (e.g., columns C through F)
description.pt: Selecionar um intervalo contíguo de colunas (ex.: colunas C até F)

rules.safetyNotes: Reversed ranges (F:C) should be normalized to (C:F). Warn if range spans more than 20 columns.

description.en: Auto-expand range boundaries as new data rows or columns are appended
description.pt: Auto-expandir limites do intervalo conforme novas linhas ou colunas de dados são adicionadas

rules.safetyNotes: Auto-expansion could include unintended data. Cap expansion at config maxScanRows to prevent runaway ranges.

description.en: Expand selection to the full contiguous non-empty region from a starting cell
description.pt: Expandir seleção para a região contígua completa não vazia a partir de uma célula inicial

rules.safetyNotes: A single stray value far from the table can cause unexpected range expansion. Use emptyRowThreshold to limit scan.

pt: selecionar toda a região de dados
expandir para todas as células conectadas

description.en: Handle spill ranges from dynamic array formulas (SEQUENCE, FILTER, SORT, UNIQUE)
description.pt: Tratar intervalos de spill de fórmulas de array dinâmico (SEQUENCE, FILTER, SORT, UNIQUE)

rules.safetyNotes: Spill ranges can change size unpredictably. Always resolve to current actual size, not cached size.

pt: intervalo de resultado de array dinâmico

description.en: Detect header row by identifying rows where all cells have bold font formatting
description.pt: Detectar linha de cabeçalho identificando linhas onde todas as células têm formatação de fonte em negrito

rules.safetyNotes: Title rows above the table may also be bold. Prefer rows with multiple cells over single-cell bold rows.

description.en: Detect header row by identifying a row with a bottom border separating it from data rows
description.pt: Detectar linha de cabeçalho identificando uma linha com borda inferior separando-a das linhas de dados

rules.safetyNotes: Summary rows mid-table may also have borders. Only consider borders within headerScanDepth from top.

description.en: Detect header row by identifying a row with a distinct background color fill
description.pt: Detectar linha de cabeçalho identificando uma linha com preenchimento de cor de fundo distinta

rules.safetyNotes: Alternating row colors (banded rows) can trigger false positives. Verify the colored row is unique, not part of a repeating pattern.

description.en: Detect header row as first row containing all text cells
description.pt: Detectar linha de cabeçalho como primeira linha com todas as células de texto

rules.safetyNotes: May misfire on rows of text-formatted numbers. Cross-check with row below for numeric content.

pt: linha superior tem nomes de colunas

description.en: Identify header rows by detecting frozen panes at the top of the sheet
description.pt: Identificar linhas de cabeçalho detectando painéis congelados no topo da planilha

rules.safetyNotes: Some sheets freeze multiple rows for titles and headers. The last frozen row is most likely the header, not the first.

pt: linhas fixas no topo são cabeçalhos

description.en: Detect grouped or hierarchical headers indicated by merged cells in the top rows
description.pt: Detectar cabeçalhos agrupados ou hierárquicos indicados por células mescladas nas linhas superiores

rules.safetyNotes: Merged cells make column indexing ambiguous. Expand merged regions to individual column mappings before processing.

description.en: Detect header boundary where row type transitions from all-text to mixed or numeric content
description.pt: Detectar limite do cabeçalho onde o tipo de linha transiciona de todo-texto para conteúdo misto ou numérico

rules.safetyNotes: Descriptive text rows above the header (titles, notes) may be caught. Ensure the text row has the same column count as data rows.

pt: detecção de cabeçalho por limite de tipo

description.en: Detect multi-row headers with hierarchical column names spanning two or more rows
description.pt: Detectar cabeçalhos de múltiplas linhas com nomes de colunas hierárquicos abrangendo duas ou mais linhas

rules.safetyNotes: Concatenated multi-row headers may produce long or awkward column names. Truncate if necessary.

description.en: Use the header row defined by an Excel Table (ListObject) structure
description.pt: Usar a linha de cabeçalho definida por uma estrutura de Tabela Excel (ListObject)

rules.safetyNotes: Table objects are the most reliable header source. Always prefer this over heuristic detection when available.

description.en: Detect header when the same text row pattern repeats across multiple sheets
description.pt: Detectar cabeçalho quando o mesmo padrão de linha de texto se repete em várias planilhas

rules.safetyNotes: Sheets may have minor header variations (typos, extra columns). Use fuzzy match for cross-sheet comparison.

pt: cabeçalhos consistentes em todas as abas

description.en: Skip leading blank rows at the top of the sheet before searching for the header row
description.pt: Pular linhas em branco iniciais no topo da planilha antes de procurar a linha de cabeçalho

rules.safetyNotes: Some sheets intentionally start with blank rows for layout. Limit skip to 10 rows to avoid skipping too far.

description.en: Identify header row as a row where all cell values are unique (no duplicates)
description.pt: Identificar linha de cabeçalho como uma linha onde todos os valores das células são únicos (sem duplicatas)

rules.safetyNotes: A data row with all unique values can be mistaken for a header. Combine with type-checking for higher confidence.

description.en: Consolidate same-structure tables from multiple sheets into a single unified dataset
description.pt: Consolidar tabelas de mesma estrutura de múltiplas planilhas em um único conjunto de dados unificado

rules.safetyNotes: Column order may vary across sheets. Align by header name, not position. Missing columns should be filled with null.

description.en: Look up a value by searching a column across multiple sheets
description.pt: Procurar um valor pesquisando uma coluna em múltiplas planilhas

rules.safetyNotes: Same value may exist in multiple sheets. Return all matches and let the user disambiguate if needed.

en: search all sheets for this ID
pt: encontrar valor em todas as planilhas
pesquisar todas as planilhas por este ID

description.en: Match and select sheets by name pattern (e.g., 'Jan*', '*2025*', 'Q[1-4]')
description.pt: Corresponder e selecionar planilhas por padrão de nome (ex.: 'Jan*', '*2025*', 'Q[1-4]')

rules.safetyNotes: Broad patterns like '*' will match all sheets. Warn the user if more than 10 sheets are matched.

description.en: Match and select sheets by their tab color
description.pt: Corresponder e selecionar planilhas pela cor da aba

rules.safetyNotes: Tab colors are unreliable metadata. Not all sheets have colors, and color meaning is user-defined. Use as secondary filter.

pt: planilhas com cor de aba verde

description.en: Verify that multiple sheets share the same column structure before consolidation
description.pt: Verificar que múltiplas planilhas compartilham a mesma estrutura de colunas antes da consolidação

rules.safetyNotes: Minor header differences (casing, abbreviations) are tolerated. Major structural differences should block consolidation.

en: confirm same columns in all sheets
pt: confirmar mesmas colunas em todas as planilhas

description.en: Expand a named range reference to its actual cell coordinates
description.pt: Expandir uma referência de intervalo nomeado para suas coordenadas de célula reais

rules.safetyNotes: Named ranges can reference other workbooks. Block external references for security.

description.en: Fuzzy match user input text to existing named range names in the workbook
description.pt: Correspondência aproximada do texto do usuário com nomes de intervalos nomeados existentes na pasta de trabalho

rules.safetyNotes: Fuzzy matches below 0.9 similarity should require user confirmation. Never auto-select ambiguous matches.

description.en: Prefer Excel table structured references over raw named ranges when both exist
description.pt: Preferir referências estruturadas de tabela Excel sobre intervalos nomeados brutos quando ambos existem

rules.safetyNotes: Table references auto-adjust on insert/delete; named ranges may not. Tables are safer for dynamic data.

pt: usar referência de tabela em vez disso

description.en: Resolve OFFSET/INDEX-based dynamic named ranges to their current cell extent
description.pt: Resolver intervalos nomeados dinâmicos baseados em OFFSET/INDEX para sua extensão de célula atual

rules.safetyNotes: Dynamic named ranges depend on volatile functions that recalculate. Always evaluate at query time, never cache.

description.en: Scope named range resolution to the current sheet when duplicate names exist at sheet and workbook level
description.pt: Limitar resolução de intervalo nomeado à planilha atual quando nomes duplicados existem no nível da planilha e da pasta de trabalho

rules.safetyNotes: Sheet-scoped names take precedence over workbook-scoped names in Excel. Follow the same convention.

pt: intervalo nomeado com escopo de planilha

description.en: Validate that a named range still points to valid, non-deleted cells
description.pt: Validar que um intervalo nomeado ainda aponta para células válidas e não excluídas

rules.safetyNotes: Stale named ranges pointing to #REF! errors are common after structural edits. Always validate before use.

pt: verificar se o intervalo é válido
verificar se o intervalo nomeado existe

description.en: Select all data rows, excluding the header row and any total/summary rows
description.pt: Selecionar todas as linhas de dados, excluindo a linha de cabeçalho e quaisquer linhas de total/resumo

rules.safetyNotes: Ensure table boundary detection has run first. Without boundaries, this may select non-data rows.

description.en: Select the last N rows from the bottom of the data range
description.pt: Selecionar as últimas N linhas do final do intervalo de dados

rules.safetyNotes: If N exceeds total data rows, return all data rows with a warning. Do not include summary rows in the count.

description.en: Filter rows by date column within a specified date range
description.pt: Filtrar linhas por coluna de data dentro de um intervalo de datas especificado

rules.safetyNotes: Date formats vary widely. Parse dates carefully and handle ambiguous formats (01/02/2025 = Jan 2 or Feb 1?).

description.en: Filter rows where a specified column equals or contains a given value
description.pt: Filtrar linhas onde uma coluna especificada é igual ou contém um valor dado

rules.safetyNotes: Contains matching may return more rows than expected. Prefer exact match when the user is specific.

description.en: Filter rows where a column value falls between a minimum and maximum
description.pt: Filtrar linhas onde o valor de uma coluna está entre um mínimo e máximo

rules.safetyNotes: Ensure min <= max. If reversed, swap values silently. Warn if no rows match the range.

pt: linhas onde valor é de 1000 a 5000

description.en: Select only unique or distinct rows, removing duplicates based on all or specified columns
description.pt: Selecionar apenas linhas únicas ou distintas, removendo duplicatas com base em todas ou colunas especificadas

rules.safetyNotes: Deduplication on all columns is strict; partial column dedup may remove rows with different values in non-key columns.

description.en: Skip rows where the target column is empty or blank
description.pt: Pular linhas onde a coluna alvo está vazia ou em branco

rules.safetyNotes: Cells containing only spaces or zero-width characters may appear empty but are not. Trim before checking.

en: only rows with data in Amount
pt: apenas linhas com dados em Valor

description.en: Skip subtotal and summary rows that contain aggregated values
description.pt: Pular linhas de subtotal e resumo que contêm valores agregados

rules.safetyNotes: Subtotal rows may not have explicit labels. Check for SUBTOTAL formulas and bold formatting as additional signals.

pt: apenas linhas de dados, sem subtotais

description.en: Select the first N rows from the top of the data range
description.pt: Selecionar as primeiras N linhas do topo do intervalo de dados

rules.safetyNotes: If N exceeds available rows, return all rows with a warning. Always exclude header from the count.

description.en: Skip rows where the target column contains zero
description.pt: Pular linhas onde a coluna alvo contém zero

rules.safetyNotes: Zero may be a valid data point in some contexts (e.g., temperature). Only exclude zeros when explicitly requested.

description.en: Select every Nth row for sampling purposes
description.pt: Selecionar cada N-ésima linha para fins de amostragem

rules.safetyNotes: Systematic sampling can introduce bias if data has periodic patterns. Consider random sampling for statistical use.

description.en: Select top N rows by value in a specified column (highest values)
description.pt: Selecionar as N linhas com maiores valores em uma coluna especificada

rules.safetyNotes: Ties at the Nth position may return more than N rows. Clarify tie-breaking strategy with the user.

description.en: Detect and block circular references that would cause infinite calculation loops
description.pt: Detectar e bloquear referências circulares que causariam loops infinitos de cálculo

rules.safetyNotes: Circular references are always blocked. Some users intentionally use iterative calculation, but the agent should not enable it automatically.

en: A1 references B1 which references A1
pt: A1 referencia B1 que referencia A1

description.en: Prevent aggregation of columns with mixed types (text and numbers mixed together)
description.pt: Prevenir agregação de colunas com tipos mistos (texto e números misturados)

rules.safetyNotes: A small fraction of text in a numeric column (e.g., 'N/A', '-') is common. Offer to filter or coerce before blocking.

pt: não é possível somar valores de texto

description.en: Warn when the resolved range contains no data rows after filtering
description.pt: Avisar quando o intervalo resolvido não contém linhas de dados após filtragem

rules.safetyNotes: An empty result set after filtering likely means the filter criteria are too narrow. Suggest relaxing conditions.

description.en: Warn when the resolved range exceeds the configured maxScanRows limit
description.pt: Avisar quando o intervalo resolvido excede o limite maxScanRows configurado

rules.safetyNotes: Large ranges may cause performance issues or timeouts. Truncate with user consent and report how many rows were excluded.

pt: aviso de conjunto de dados grande

description.en: Prevent selecting more columns than the configured maxScanCols limit
description.pt: Prevenir seleção de mais colunas do que o limite maxScanCols configurado

rules.safetyNotes: Sheets with hundreds of columns are rare but possible. Truncation should be from the right unless user specifies otherwise.

description.en: Warn when the resolved range intersects merged cell regions that may distort results
description.pt: Avisar quando o intervalo resolvido intercepta regiões de células mescladas que podem distorcer resultados

rules.safetyNotes: Merged cells store value only in top-left cell. Other cells in the merge appear empty. Expand values before aggregation.

description.en: Warn when no header row could be detected by any header detection rule
description.pt: Avisar quando nenhuma linha de cabeçalho pôde ser detectada por qualquer regra de detecção de cabeçalho

rules.safetyNotes: Without a header, column references by name are impossible. Fall back to first row but require user confirmation.

pt: não foi possível detectar nomes de colunas

description.en: Warn when the resolved range contains volatile functions that recalculate on every access
description.pt: Avisar quando o intervalo resolvido contém funções voláteis que recalculam a cada acesso

rules.safetyNotes: Volatile functions cause values to change between reads. Snapshot values at query time if consistent results are needed.

description.en: Detect the right edge of a table by finding a fully blank column
description.pt: Detectar a borda direita de uma tabela encontrando uma coluna completamente em branco

rules.safetyNotes: A single blank column between data regions may be a separator, not a table edge. Check if data resumes after the gap.

pt: coluna em branco marca borda da tabela
tabela termina na coluna em branco

description.en: Detect the bottom of a table by finding consecutive blank rows
description.pt: Detectar o final de uma tabela encontrando linhas em branco consecutivas

rules.safetyNotes: A single blank row may appear within valid data (e.g., section separator). Require emptyRowThreshold consecutive blanks.

pt: tabela termina em linhas em branco
linhas vazias marcam final da tabela

description.en: Use Excel ListObject table boundaries as the definitive table extent
description.pt: Usar limites de tabela ListObject do Excel como extensão definitiva da tabela

rules.safetyNotes: Excel table objects are the most reliable boundary source. Always prefer over heuristic detection.

description.en: Detect table boundary where cell formatting abruptly changes (font, alignment, number format)
description.pt: Detectar limite de tabela onde a formatação de célula muda abruptamente (fonte, alinhamento, formato numérico)

rules.safetyNotes: Format changes can occur within a table (e.g., conditional formatting). Use as a secondary signal alongside other boundary rules.

description.en: Use merged cell regions to define sub-table boundaries within a sheet
description.pt: Usar regiões de células mescladas para definir limites de sub-tabelas dentro de uma planilha

rules.safetyNotes: Merged cells as group headers are common in formatted reports. Each merged region may define a separate logical table.

description.en: Use a named range to define the table extent when available
description.pt: Usar um intervalo nomeado para definir a extensão da tabela quando disponível

rules.safetyNotes: Named ranges may be stale if the sheet has been edited. Validate that the range still contains data.

description.en: Use the defined print area as a hint for the intended data region
description.pt: Usar a área de impressão definida como dica da região de dados pretendida

rules.safetyNotes: Print area may include titles, footers, and margins beyond the data table. Use only as a supplementary hint.

en: use print range as boundary hint
pt: área de impressão cobre os dados
usar intervalo de impressão como dica de limite
dados dentro da área de impressão

description.en: Detect a summary or total row at the bottom of the table and exclude it from data range
description.pt: Detectar uma linha de resumo ou total no final da tabela e excluí-la do intervalo de dados

rules.safetyNotes: Multiple summary rows may exist (subtotals + grand total). Detect all of them, not just the last row.

description.en: Determine table width by checking column type consistency within data rows
description.pt: Determinar largura da tabela verificando consistência de tipo de coluna dentro das linhas de dados

rules.safetyNotes: Columns with mixed types may still be valid data (e.g., text notes column). Combine with other signals.

pt: tipos de coluna consistentes definem largura
largura de tabela baseada em tipo

description.en: Detect multiple separate tables on a single sheet separated by blank rows or columns
description.pt: Detectar múltiplas tabelas separadas em uma única planilha separadas por linhas ou colunas em branco

rules.safetyNotes: Multiple tables on one sheet are ambiguous. Always ask the user which table they mean if more than one is detected.

description.en: Filter rows to the current calendar month
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o mês calendário atual

rules.safetyNotes: Current month changes at midnight on the 1st. Ensure the reference date is calculated at query time.

description.en: Filter rows to the current calendar quarter
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o trimestre calendário atual

rules.safetyNotes: Calendar quarters (Q1=Jan-Mar) may differ from fiscal quarters. Clarify with user if ambiguous.

description.en: Filter rows to the current calendar year
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o ano calendário atual

rules.safetyNotes: If data only goes up to a past month, the result may be partial. Inform the user of the actual date coverage.

description.en: Filter rows using fiscal year boundaries that may differ from calendar year
description.pt: Filtrar linhas usando limites de ano fiscal que podem diferir do ano calendário

rules.safetyNotes: Fiscal year start month varies by company and country (Apr, Jul, Oct are common). Always ask or detect from data context.

description.en: Filter rows to a rolling 12-month window from today
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para uma janela rolante de 12 meses a partir de hoje

rules.safetyNotes: Rolling 12 months from today may not align with calendar months. Clarify if user means 'last 12 complete months'.

description.en: Filter rows to the previous calendar month
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o mês calendário anterior

rules.safetyNotes: Last month is always a complete month. On March 1st, last month covers all of February.

description.en: Filter rows to the last N calendar days from today
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para os últimos N dias calendário a partir de hoje

rules.safetyNotes: Last N days includes today. Clarify if user means 'previous N days' (excluding today) or 'last N days' (including today).

description.en: Filter rows to the last N calendar months from the current month
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para os últimos N meses calendário a partir do mês atual

rules.safetyNotes: Ambiguity: 'last 3 months' could mean 3 complete prior months or 3 months including current. Default excludes current month.

description.en: Filter rows to the previous calendar quarter
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o trimestre calendário anterior

rules.safetyNotes: In Q1, last quarter refers to Q4 of the previous year. Handle the year boundary correctly.

description.en: Filter rows to the previous calendar year
description.pt: Filtrar linhas para o ano calendário anterior

rules.safetyNotes: Last year is always a complete calendar year. In 2026, last year covers all of 2025.

description.en: Filter rows from the first day of the current month to today (MTD)
description.pt: Filtrar linhas do primeiro dia do mês atual até hoje (acumulado do mês)

rules.safetyNotes: MTD on the 1st of the month returns only one day of data. Warn if the result seems unusually small.

description.en: Filter rows from the first day of the current quarter to today (QTD)
description.pt: Filtrar linhas do primeiro dia do trimestre atual até hoje (acumulado do trimestre)

rules.safetyNotes: QTD early in a quarter may return very few rows. Combine with prior quarter comparison for context.

description.en: Filter rows from the start of the current week to today (WTD)
description.pt: Filtrar linhas do início da semana atual até hoje (acumulado da semana)

rules.safetyNotes: Week start day varies by locale (Monday vs Sunday). Default to Monday but allow configuration.

description.en: Filter rows from January 1st of the current year to today (YTD)
description.pt: Filtrar linhas de 1º de janeiro do ano atual até hoje (acumulado do ano)

rules.safetyNotes: YTD in January returns only partial data. Compare with prior-year YTD for meaningful analysis.
